findings.message: No remaining sealed holdout values were used for tuning.
Verified Taiwanese IT/UI localization quality; no OpenCC or raw competitor translation artifacts detected (examples noted by Gemini included 快取, 身分權杖, 重新整理, 設定磁碟區, QR Code).
Sentence mappings are full-sentence and identity mapping protection for Traditional targets is explicitly stated in policy.
Promotion gate evidence supports all 12 cases being marked as promotion_ready.

tool_notes: Initial Gemini CLI attempt used GEMINI_API_KEY and failed with API_KEY_INVALID.
Second Gemini CLI attempt unset GEMINI_API_KEY/GOOGLE_API_KEY/GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY and completed successfully via non-API-key CLI authentication.
Gemini was instructed not to use tools or read repository files and reviewed only public candidate/gate values plus the mapping list.
